reviews.comment:
Hace meses no tiene para inflar. Además es un lugar de encuentro. Y si esperas afuera del servicompra te corren si no compras... cosa q hiba a hacer. Y decidí no comprar por la forma

(Translated by Google)
It hasn't had anything to inflate for months. Besides, it's a meeting place. And if you wait outside the convenience store, they'll kick you out if you don't buy anything... which is what I was going to do. So I decided not to buy anything because of the way things were.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPdEpiaHpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy pasé por acá antes de tomar un ómnibus. Esta muy viejo el local. No tienen variedad de nada. Para comer: media lunas y unos sándwiches de miga que eran puro pan. Obvio que lo comí (pues hambre)
La radio anda mal
Les empleados tienen uniformes muy viejos
El mobiliario también luce como del 2000 también
@ypfmendoza !

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by here today before catching a bus. The place is really old. They don't have any variety at all. For food: croissants and some finger sandwiches that were just plain bread. Of course I ate them (I was hungry).
The radio is acting up.
The employees' uniforms are really old.
The furniture also looks like it's from 2000.
@ypfmendoza!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyaC03SFBREAE
